## Runtime.Session.RolledTruffleEditingSession.scaleToYield() method

Scales to new yield specification using linear count-based scaling. All filling sessions scale proportionally by the count ratio.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaleToYield(yieldSpec: Confections.AnyConfectionYield): Result<Confections.IConfectionYield>;
```
